arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the VPC endpoint.

cidr_blocks.description: List of CIDR blocks for the VPC endpoint.

dns_entry.description: The DNS entries for the VPC endpoint.

dns_options.description: DNS options for the VPC endpoint.

id.description: The ID of the VPC endpoint.

ip_address_type.description: The type of IP address used by the VPC endpoint.

network_interface_ids.description: Set of network interface IDs associated with the VPC endpoint.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the VPC endpoint.

policy.description: The policy document associated with the VPC endpoint.

prefix_list_id.description: The prefix list ID for the VPC endpoint.

private_dns_enabled.description: Indicates whether private DNS is enabled for the VPC endpoint.

requester_managed.description: Indicates if the VPC endpoint is managed by the requester.

route_table_ids.description: Set of route table IDs associated with the VPC endpoint.

security_group_ids.description: Set of security group IDs associated with the VPC endpoint.

service_name.description: The name of the service to which the VPC endpoint is connected.

state.description: The current state of the VPC endpoint.

subnet_ids.description: Set of subnet IDs associated with the VPC endpoint.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the VPC endpoint.

vpc_endpoint_type.description: The type of the VPC endpoint.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC in which the endpoint is located.
